'''Cel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] and a [[Communications officer/Legends|communications officer]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] and [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|Defense Force]].

==Biography==
When Cel was ten, [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] was [[Siege of Coruscant|besieged]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], she served as a communications officer in the fleet of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and was stationed on the [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']], under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She participated in the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]] in the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]] and always informed Antilles about the progress of the battle.

[[29 ABY/Legends|A year later]], she assisted Wedge in the [[Battle of Corulag (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Corulag]] and announced that the holo-connections to [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] were received by new orders.

{{Char-stub}}
